<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="myop:size" content='{"width":"100%","height":"100%"}'>
    <title>Myop for Builders</title>
    
    <script type="myop/types">
    interface MyopInitData {
        hero?: {
            title?: string;
            highlight?: string;
            subtitle?: string;
            primaryButton?: {
                text: string;
                url: string;
            };
            secondaryButton?: {
                text: string;
                url: string;
            };
        };
    }

    interface MyopCtaPayloads {
        'cta-clicked': { ctaId: string; ctaLabel: string };
        'hero-primary-clicked': void;
        'hero-secondary-clicked': void;
        'size-requested': {
            width?: number | null;
            height?: number | null;
            minWidth?: number | null;
            maxWidth?: number | null;
            minHeight?: number | null;
            maxHeight?: number | null;
            required?: boolean;
        };
    }

    declare function myop_init_interface(): MyopInitData;
    declare function myop_init_interface(data: MyopInitData): void;

    declare function myop_cta_handler<K extends keyof MyopCtaPayloads>(
        action: K,
        payload: MyopCtaPayloads[K]
    ): void;
    </script>

    <link href="https://framerusercontent.com/modules/lhLZpGGjF11D3HGVmNbJ/fkGaYkJ2YuNFR9uTZkQu/ABCFavoritLight.css" rel="stylesheet">

    <style>
        :root {
            --purple-5: #F0E8FF;
            --purple-10: #DECCFF;
            --grey-20: #D3D1D5;
            --white: #FFF;
            --panel-bg: #fafafa;
            --bg-color: #ffffff;
            --hover-bg: #f4f4f5;
            --border-color: #e5e5e5;
            --text-color: #18181b;
            --text-secondary: #3E3D3E;
            --accent-blue: #9A70DF;
            --accent-green: #10b981;
            --accent-red: #ef4444;
            --gradient-primary: linear-gradient(234deg, #FFE3D6 3.79%, #EEEBFF 70.67%);
            --gradient-published: linear-gradient(237deg, #FF7133 19.7%, #7C69FD 75.96%);

            /* Typography - Desktop */
            --hero-h1: 72px;
            --hero-subhead: 20px;
            --section-h2: 40px;
            --section-subhead: 18px;
            --h3: 22px;
            --body-text: 16px;
            --btn-text: 15px;
            --btn-text-content: 13px;

            /* Typography - Mobile */
            --hero-h1-mobile: 42px;
            --section-h2-mobile: 36px;

            /* Weights */
            --weight-light: 200;
            --weight-regular: 300;
            --weight-medium: 400;

            /* Letter-spacing */
            --ls-headers-lg: -2.5px;    /* Headers 72px+ (Hero H1 72px) */
            --ls-headers-40: -0.5px;    /* Headers 40px (Section H2 40px) */
            --ls-headers-md: -1px;      /* Headers 30-40px (Mobile H2 36px, Mobile H1 42px) */
            --ls-body: 0px;             /* Everything else (body, buttons, subheads, h3, etc.) */

            /* Line-height */
            --lh-headers: 1.1;
            --lh-body: 1.5;

            /* Spacing */
            --section-padding-lg: 80px;
            --section-padding-sm: 64px;
        }

        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        html, body {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 0px;
            height: 0px;
            background: transparent;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: transparent;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: transparent;
        }

        /* Hide scrollbar for Firefox */
        * {
            scrollbar-width: none;
        }

        /* Hide scrollbar for IE/Edge */
        * {
            -ms-overflow-style: none;
        }

        #app-root {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            overflow-y: auto;
            overflow-x: hidden;
            -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
            touch-action: pan-y;
            background: transparent;
            color: var(--text-color);
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            line-height: 1.5;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
            position: relative;
        }

        /* Hero section */
        .hero-overlay-offset {
            position: relative;
        }

        /* Purple mesh gradient background for hero */
        .hero-mesh-bg {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            pointer-events: none;
            background: #faf5ff;
        }

        .hero-mesh-bg .blob {
            position: absolute;
            border-radius: 50%;
            will-change: transform;
        }

        .hero-mesh-bg .blob-1 {
            width: 120vmax;
            height: 120vmax;
            left: -40%;
            top: -20%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(243, 232, 255, 0.95) 0%, rgba(243, 232, 255, 0.6) 50%, transparent 70%);
            filter: blur(80px);
            animation: meshBlob1 20s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .hero-mesh-bg .blob-2 {
            width: 100vmax;
            height: 100vmax;
            right: -30%;
            top: -20%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6) 40%, transparent 70%);
            filter: blur(60px);
            animation: meshBlob2 26.7s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .hero-mesh-bg .blob-3 {
            width: 130vmax;
            height: 130vmax;
            left: 10%;
            bottom: -50%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(243, 232, 255, 0.95) 0%, rgba(243, 232, 255, 0.6) 45%, transparent 70%);
            filter: blur(70px);
            animation: meshBlob3 23.3s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .hero-mesh-bg .blob-4 {
            width: 90vmax;
            height: 90vmax;
            right: -20%;
            bottom: -10%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(243, 232, 255, 0.95) 0%, rgba(243, 232, 255, 0.6) 50%, transparent 70%);
            filter: blur(60px);
            animation: meshBlob4 16.7s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        @keyframes meshBlob1 {
            0%, 100% { transform: translate(0%, 0%) scale(1) rotate(0deg); }
            25% { transform: translate(15%, 20%) scale(1.1) rotate(5deg); }
            50% { transform: translate(25%, 10%) scale(0.95) rotate(-3deg); }
            75% { transform: translate(10%, 25%) scale(1.05) rotate(3deg); }
        }

        @keyframes meshBlob2 {
            0%, 100% { transform: translate(0%, 0%) scale(1) rotate(0deg); }
            25% { transform: translate(-20%, 15%) scale(1.08) rotate(-4deg); }
            50% { transform: translate(-10%, 30%) scale(0.92) rotate(5deg); }
            75% { transform: translate(-25%, 5%) scale(1.04) rotate(-2deg); }
        }

        @keyframes meshBlob3 {
            0%, 100% { transform: translate(0%, 0%) scale(1) rotate(0deg); }
            25% { transform: translate(-15%, -20%) scale(1.06) rotate(4deg); }
            50% { transform: translate(10%, -15%) scale(0.94) rotate(-5deg); }
            75% { transform: translate(-5%, -25%) scale(1.08) rotate(2deg); }
        }

        @keyframes meshBlob4 {
            0%, 100% { transform: translate(0%, 0%) scale(1) rotate(0deg); }
            25% { transform: translate(-20%, -15%) scale(1.12) rotate(-3deg); }
            50% { transform: translate(-30%, -5%) scale(0.9) rotate(4deg); }
            75% { transform: translate(-10%, -20%) scale(1.02) rotate(-4deg); }
        }

        .page-content {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
            background: #faf5ff;
        }

        .container {
            max-width: 1100px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 40px;
        }

        /* ========== NAVIGATION ========== */
        nav {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            z-index: 10000;
            padding: 15px 3rem;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease-in-out;
            height: 64px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        nav.nav-hidden {
            transform: translateY(-100%);
        }

        .nav-left {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 44px;
        }

        .logo {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            margin-left: -10px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
            text-decoration: none;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }

        @media (hover: hover) {
            .logo:hover .logo-icon {
                fill: url(#logo-hover-gradient);
                transition: fill 0.25s ease;
            }
            .logo:active {
                opacity: 0.7;
            }
        }

        .logo svg {
            height: 34px;
            width: auto;
        }

        .logo-icon {
            transition: fill 0.25s ease;
        }

        .logo svg path {
            transition: fill 0.25s ease;
        }

        .nav-links-left {
            display: flex;
            gap: 44px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .nav-links-center {
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            display: flex;
            gap: 38px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .nav-links-right {
            display: flex;
            gap: 2rem;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .nav-links {
            display: flex;
            gap: 2rem;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .nav-link {
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: var(--btn-text);
            line-height: 1;
            transition: color 0.15s ease;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
        }

        .nav-link svg {
            width: 9px;
            height: 7px;
        }

        @media (hover: hover) {
            .nav-link:hover {
                color: var(--accent-blue);
            }
        }

        /* ========== Nav Dropdown (Redesigned Panel) ========== */
        .nav-dropdown {
            position: static;
        }

        .nav-dropdown-trigger {
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: 15px;
            transition: color 0.15s ease;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 2px;
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            padding: 0;
            padding-left: 2px;
            margin-right: -1.5px;
            font-family: inherit;
        }

        @media (hover: hover) {
            .nav-dropdown-trigger:hover {
                color: var(--accent-blue);
            }
        }

        .nav-dropdown-chevron {
            width: 8px;
            height: 6px;
            margin-left: 4.5px;
            margin-top: 3.5px;
            transition: transform 0.2s ease;
        }

        .nav-dropdown.open .nav-dropdown-chevron {
            transform: rotate(180deg);
        }

        .nav-dropdown-panel {
            position: fixed;
            top: 55px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            background: var(--white);
            border: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 16px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08), 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);
            padding: 28px 32px 32px;
            display: none;
            z-index: 1000;
        }

        .nav-dropdown.open .nav-dropdown-panel {
            display: block;
        }

        .nav-dropdown-panel.products-panel {
            width: 440px;
        }

        .nav-dropdown-panel.resources-panel {
            width: 420px;
        }

        .dropdown-panel-title {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--text-color);
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }

        .dropdown-panel-divider {
            height: 1px;
            background: #e8e8e8;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 14px;
            padding: 12px 12px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            text-decoration: none;
            color: var(--text-color);
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-item:hover {
            background: var(--purple-5, #F0E8FF);
        }

        .dropdown-rich-icon {
            width: 44px;
            height: 44px;
            min-width: 44px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: transparent;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-icon svg {
            width: 44px;
            height: 44px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-events"]),
        .dropdown-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-faq"]),
        .mobile-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-events"]),
        .mobile-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-faq"]) {
            width: 39.6px;
            height: 39.6px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-playground"]),
        .dropdown-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-platforms"]),
        .dropdown-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-marketplace"]),
        .mobile-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-playground"]),
        .mobile-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-platforms"]),
        .mobile-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-marketplace"]) {
            width: 37.62px;
            height: 37.62px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-pricing"]),
        .mobile-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-pricing"]) {
            width: 33px;
            height: 33px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-content {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 2px;
            min-width: 0;
            padding-top: 4px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-title {
            font-size: 14.5px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--text-color);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-desc {
            font-size: 13px;
            color: #71717a;
            line-height: 1.4;
            font-weight: 300;
        }

        .coming-soon-badge {
            font-size: 10px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--accent-blue);
            background: var(--purple-5);
            padding: 2px 8px;
            border-radius: 99px;
            white-space: nowrap;
            letter-spacing: 0.3px;
        }

        .community-icons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 6px;
            margin-top: 4px;
        }

        .community-icon-link {
            width: 28px;
            height: 28px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            background: #f5f5f5;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
        }

        .community-icon-link:hover {
            background: var(--purple-10);
        }

        .community-icon-link:has(.community-platform-icon):hover {
            background: #f5f5f5;
        }

        .community-icon-link svg {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
        }

        .community-platform-icon {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            object-fit: contain;
            display: block;
        }

        /* Button styling for nav */
        .nav-cta {
            padding: 8px 16px;
            background: #ffffff;
            border-radius: 6px;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: 15px;
            border: 1px solid #000000;
            height: 35.5px;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        @media (hover: hover) {
            .nav-cta:hover {
                background: var(--Purple-5, #F0E8FF);
                color: var(--text-color);
            }
        }

        /* ========== Hamburger Menu ========== */
        .hamburger {
            display: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .hamburger svg {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
        }

        /* ========== Mobile Menu ========== */
        .mobile-menu {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            background: var(--bg-color);
            transform: translateX(100%);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease, visibility 0.3s ease;
            z-index: 200;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            pointer-events: none;
            visibility: hidden;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }

        .mobile-menu.open {
            transform: translateX(0);
            pointer-events: auto;
            visibility: visible;
        }

        .mobile-menu-header {
            padding: 15px 1.5rem;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            height: 64px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        .mobile-menu-close {
            cursor: pointer;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .mobile-menu-links {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            padding: 2rem 0;
        }

        .mobile-link {
            padding: 1rem 2rem;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 300;
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
        }

        .mobile-link:hover {
            background: #F9F6FF;
        }

        .mobile-cta {
            margin: 1rem 2rem;
            padding: 12px 24px;
            background: linear-gradient(234deg, #FFE3D6 3.79%, #EEEBFF 70.67%);
            border-radius: 6px;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 15px;
            text-align: center;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }

        .mobile-cta:hover {
            background: var(--Purple-5, #F0E8FF);
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .mobile-dropdown {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .mobile-dropdown-trigger {
            padding: 1rem 2rem;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 300;
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            width: 100%;
            text-align: left;
            font-family: inherit;
        }

        .mobile-dropdown-trigger:hover {
            background: #F9F6FF;
        }

        .mobile-dropdown-chevron {
            width: 10px;
            height: 6px;
            transition: transform 0.2s ease;
        }

        .mobile-dropdown.open .mobile-dropdown-chevron {
            transform: rotate(180deg);
        }

        .mobile-dropdown-menu {
            display: none;
            flex-direction: column;
            padding-left: 1rem;
        }

        .mobile-dropdown.open .mobile-dropdown-menu {
            display: flex;
        }

        .mobile-rich-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 12px;
            padding: 12px 1rem;
            border-radius: 10px;
            text-decoration: none;
            color: var(--text-color);
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
        }

        .mobile-rich-item:hover {
            background: var(--purple-5);
        }

        .mobile-rich-icon {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            min-width: 40px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            background: transparent;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .mobile-rich-icon svg {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
        }

        .mobile-rich-content {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 2px;
            padding-top: 2px;
        }

        .mobile-rich-title {
            font-size: 15px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--text-color);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .mobile-rich-desc {
            font-size: 13px;
            color: #71717a;
            line-height: 1.35;
            font-weight: 300;
        }

        .mobile-community-icons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 6px;
            margin-top: 4px;
        }

        /* ========== Sign-in Modal ========== */
        .signin-modal-overlay {
            display: none;
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.45);
            z-index: 9999;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        .signin-modal-overlay.open {
            display: flex;
        }
        .signin-card {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 48px 40px;
            gap: 20px;
            width: 376px;
            background: #FFFFFF;
            border-radius: 16px;
            position: relative;
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
        }
        .signin-title-row {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 0 0 8px;
            gap: 10px;
            width: 296px;
            align-self: stretch;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .signin-btn-social {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            gap: 8px;
            width: 296px;
            height: 48px;
            background: #FFFFFF;
            border: 1px solid #D3D1D5;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            align-self: stretch;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: 16px;
            line-height: 24px;
            color: #0A090A;
            transition: background 0.15s;
        }
        .signin-btn-social:hover { background: #f5f5f5; }
        .signin-google-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .signin-divider {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 0;
            gap: 12px;
            width: 296px;
            align-self: stretch;
        }
        .signin-divider-line { flex-grow: 1; height: 0; border-top: 1px solid #B6B5B7; }
        .signin-divider-text { font-weight: 400; font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; color: #B6B5B7; }
        .signin-btn-email {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            gap: 8px;
            width: 296px;
            height: 48px;
            background: #FFFFFF;
            border: 1px solid #D3D1D5;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            align-self: stretch;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: 16px;
            line-height: 24px;
            color: #0A090A;
            transition: background 0.15s;
        }
        .signin-btn-email:hover { background: #f5f5f5; }
        .signin-terms-text {
            color: #3E3D3E;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 16px;
            letter-spacing: -0.11px;
            text-align: center;
            align-self: stretch;
        }
        .signin-terms-link { color: inherit; text-decoration: underline; }
        .signin-terms-link:hover { color: #6C18FF; text-decoration: underline; }
        .signin-close-btn {
            position: absolute;
            top: 14px;
            right: 14px;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            color: #999;
            font-size: 16px;
            line-height: 1;
            padding: 4px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }
        .signin-close-btn:hover { color: #333; }
        @media (max-width: 480px) {
            .signin-card { width: calc(100vw - 32px); padding: 40px 24px; }
            .signin-title-row, .signin-btn-social, .signin-divider, .signin-btn-email { width: 100%; }
        }

        /* Hero */
        .hero {
            height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 0;
            position: relative;
            background: transparent;
        }

        /* Logo Animation Styles */
        .cards-container {
            position: relative;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            width: 100%;
            height: 80px;
            margin-top: 20px;
            overflow: visible;
        }

        .logo-card {
            position: absolute;
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            left: 50%;
            top: 50%;
            cursor: pointer;
            transform-style: preserve-3d;
            perspective: 1000px;
            will-change: transform, opacity;
            pointer-events: auto;
        }

        .logo-card-inner {
            position: relative;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            transform-style: preserve-3d;
            transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1);
        }

        .logo-card:hover .logo-card-inner {
            transform: rotateY(180deg);
        }

        .logo-card-front,
        .logo-card-back {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            border-radius: 12px;
            backface-visibility: hidden;
            -webkit-backface-visibility: hidden;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .logo-card-front {
            background: transparent;
            padding: 9px;
        }

        .logo-card-front svg,
        .logo-card-front img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: contain;
        }

        .logo-card-front.logo-scaled-90 svg,
        .logo-card-front.logo-scaled-90 img {
            width: 90%;
            height: 90%;
        }

        .logo-card-front.logo-scaled-80 svg,
        .logo-card-front.logo-scaled-80 img {
            width: 80%;
            height: 80%;
        }

        .logo-card-front.logo-scaled-75 svg,
        .logo-card-front.logo-scaled-75 img {
            width: 75%;
            height: 75%;
        }

        .logo-card-front.logo-scaled-70 svg,
        .logo-card-front.logo-scaled-70 img {
            width: 70%;
            height: 70%;
        }

        .logo-card-back {
            transform: rotateY(180deg);
            background: linear-gradient(145deg, #1a1a1a 0%, #0a0a0a 100%);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        }

        .logo-card-back .label {
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
            font-size: 7px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #9157F7;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
        }

        @media (max-width: 905px) {
            .cards-container {
                height: 70px;
                margin: 35px auto 20px;
            }
            .logo-card {
                width: 50px;
                height: 50px;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 600px) {
            .cards-container {
                height: 60px;
                margin: 30px auto 20px;
            }
            .logo-card {
                width: 50px;
                height: 50px;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 480px) {
            .cards-container {
                height: 55px;
                margin: 25px auto 15px;
            }
            .logo-card {
                width: 50px;
                height: 50px;
            }
            .logo-card-back .label {
                font-size: 5px;
            }
        }

        .hero .container {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 2;
            text-align: center;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
        }

        /* Hero H1 - 72px / 42px mobile, weight 200, ls -2.5px, lh 1.1 */
        .hero-title {
            font-size: var(--hero-h1);
            font-weight: var(--weight-light);
            line-height: var(--lh-headers);
            margin-bottom: 24px;
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-lg);
            color: var(--text-color);
            opacity: 0;
            animation: fadeInUp 0.5s ease forwards 0.2s;
            max-width: 600px;
        }

        .hero-title .highlight {
            color: var(--text-color);
            -webkit-text-fill-color: var(--text-color);
            background: none;
        }

        /* Hero Subhead - 20px, weight 200, ls -1.5px, lh 1.5 */
        .hero-subtitle {
            font-size: var(--hero-subhead);
            font-weight: var(--weight-light);
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            max-width: 600px;
            line-height: var(--lh-body);
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-body);
            margin-bottom: 32px;
            opacity: 0;
            animation: fadeInUp 0.5s ease forwards 0.3s;
            text-align: center;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .hero-title {
                font-size: var(--hero-h1-mobile);
                letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-md);
            }

            .hero-subtitle {
                font-size: var(--hero-subhead);
                line-height: var(--lh-body);
            }
        }

        /* Required: CSS custom property for rotating gradient animation */
        @property --rotate-angle {
            syntax: '<angle>';
            initial-value: 0deg;
            inherits: false;
        }

        .hero-cta {
            opacity: 0;
            animation: fadeInUp 0.5s ease forwards 0.4s;
        }

        /* Content Buttons - 13px, weight 400, lh 1 */
        .hero-cta button,
        .cta-button {
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            font-size: var(--btn-text-content);
            font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
            line-height: 1;
            padding: 12px 24px;
            background: transparent;
            color: #18181b;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }

        .hero-cta button::before,
        .cta-button::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            border-radius: 6px;
            background: conic-gradient(from 0deg, #FF8651, #FFBEA8, #A397F5, #FF8651);
            z-index: -1;
            opacity: 1;
            transition: opacity 0.15s ease;
        }

        .hero-cta button:hover,
        .cta-button:hover {
            color: #18181b;
        }

        .hero-cta button:hover::before,
        .cta-button:hover::before {
            animation: rotate-gradient 4s linear infinite;
        }

        @keyframes rotate-gradient {
            from { --rotate-angle: 0deg; }
            to { --rotate-angle: 360deg; }
        }

        .hero-cta button:hover::before,
        .cta-button:hover::before {
            background: conic-gradient(from var(--rotate-angle), #FF8651, #FFBEA8, #A397F5, #FF8651);
            animation: rotate-gradient 4s linear infinite;
        }

        /* Black CTA button - Content Buttons: 13px, weight 400, lh 1 */
        .cta-button-black {
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            font-size: var(--btn-text-content);
            font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
            line-height: 1;
            padding: 12px 24px;
            background: #18181b;
            color: #ffffff;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }

        .cta-button-black::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            border-radius: 6px;
            background: #18181b;
            z-index: -1;
            opacity: 1;
            transition: opacity 0.15s ease;
        }

        .cta-button-black:hover {
            color: #e4e4e7;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        /* White outline CTA button - Content Buttons: 13px, weight 400, lh 1 */
        .cta-button-outline {
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            font-size: var(--btn-text-content);
            font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
            line-height: 1;
            padding: 12px 24px;
            background: #ffffff;
            color: #18181b;
            border: 1px solid #18181b;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }

        .cta-button-outline::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: -1px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            z-index: -1;
            opacity: 1;
            transition: opacity 0.15s ease;
        }

        .cta-button-outline:hover {
            color: #3f3f46;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .closing-buttons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 16px;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .closing-buttons.hero-buttons {
            justify-content: center;
            margin-top: 24px;
        }

        @keyframes fadeInUp {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(20px);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0);
            }
        }

        /* Problem section - 1st section after hero = 80px padding */
        .problem {
            padding: var(--section-padding-lg) 0;
            background: #faf5ff;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        /* Problem section mesh gradient - continuation of hero */
        .problem-mesh-bg {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            pointer-events: none;
            background: #faf5ff;
        }

        .problem-mesh-bg .blob {
            position: absolute;
            border-radius: 50%;
            will-change: transform;
        }

        .problem-mesh-bg .blob-1 {
            width: 100vmax;
            height: 100vmax;
            left: -30%;
            top: -40%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(243, 232, 255, 0.95) 0%, rgba(243, 232, 255, 0.6) 50%, transparent 70%);
            filter: blur(80px);
            animation: meshBlob1 20s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .problem-mesh-bg .blob-2 {
            width: 80vmax;
            height: 80vmax;
            right: -20%;
            top: -30%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6) 40%, transparent 70%);
            filter: blur(60px);
            animation: meshBlob2 26.7s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .problem .container {
            padding: 0 20px;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        /* Animated Text Section */
        .animated-text-section {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 60px 40px;
            position: relative;
            background: transparent;
        }

        .animated-text {
            font-size: clamp(22px, 4.5vw, 46px);
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 1.4;
            text-align: center;
            max-width: 800px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            letter-spacing: -2px;
            word-wrap: break-word;
            overflow-wrap: break-word;
        }

        .animated-text .char {
            color: rgba(154, 112, 223, 0.25);
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
            display: inline;
        }

        .animated-text .char.active {
            color: #18181b;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .hero {
                height: 100vh;
                justify-content: center;
            }

            .hero .container {
                display: flex;
                flex-direction: column;
                justify-content: center;
                align-items: center;
            }

            .animated-text-section {
                padding: 40px 20px;
            }

            .animated-text {
                margin: 0 auto;
                letter-spacing: -0.5px;
                font-size: 30px;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 480px) {
            .animated-text-section {
                padding: 30px 20px;
            }

            .animated-text {
                font-size: 30px;
                line-height: var(--lh-body);
                letter-spacing: -0.5px;
                margin: 0 auto;
                word-break: normal;
                overflow-wrap: normal;
                hyphens: none;
            }

            .animated-text br {
                display: none;
            }

            .problem {
                padding: var(--section-padding-sm) 0;
            }
        }

        /* Solution section - 2nd section = 64px padding */
        .solution {
            padding: var(--section-padding-sm) 0;
            background: transparent;
            position: relative;
        }

        .solution-intro {
            max-width: 700px;
            margin-bottom: 60px;
        }

        .solution-title {
            font-size: var(--section-h2);
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-40);
            line-height: var(--lh-headers);
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .solution-text {
            font-size: var(--body-text);
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            line-height: var(--lh-body);
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-body);
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
        }

        .solution-text strong {
            color: var(--accent-blue);
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .solution-title {
                font-size: var(--section-h2-mobile);
                letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-md);
            }
        }

        /* Features - 3rd section = 80px padding */
        .features {
            padding: var(--section-padding-lg) 0;
            background: #FAF5FF;
            position: relative;
        }

        /* Connect Video Section - 2nd section = 64px padding */
        .connect-video-section {
            background: #FAF5FF;
            padding: var(--section-padding-sm) 48px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .connect-section-inner {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            max-width: 1200px;
            width: 100%;
            gap: 32px;
        }

        .connect-text-content {
            flex: 1;
            max-width: 400px;
        }

        /* Section H2 - 40px / 36px mobile, weight 300, ls -0.5px, lh 1.1 */
        .connect-text-content h2 {
            font-size: var(--section-h2);
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
            color: var(--text-color);
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            line-height: var(--lh-headers);
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-40);
        }

        /* Section Subhead - 18px, weight 300, ls -1.5px, lh 1.5 */
        .connect-text-content .subhead {
            font-size: var(--section-subhead);
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            line-height: var(--lh-body);
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-body);
            margin-bottom: 32px;
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
        }

        .connect-features {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 12px;
        }

        /* Running text style */
        .connect-feature-item {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 0;
            font-size: var(--body-text);
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            line-height: var(--lh-body);
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-body);
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .connect-feature-header {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 12px;
        }

        .connect-feature-toggle {
            font-size: 17px;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: var(--text-color);
            width: 12px;
            text-align: center;
            order: 2; /* Move to the right */
        }

        .connect-feature-content {
            max-height: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: max-height 0.3s ease, padding 0.3s ease;
            padding-left: 24px;
            font-size: 14px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            line-height: 1.5;
        }

        .connect-feature-item.expanded .connect-feature-content {
            max-height: 100px;
            padding-top: 8px;
        }

        .connect-feature-item.expanded .connect-feature-toggle {
            content: '−';
        }

        .connect-video-wrapper {
            position: relative;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .connect-video-section video {
            width: 550px;
            height: 320px;
            max-width: 100%;
            border-radius: 12px;
            display: block;
        }

        .connect-video-wrapper::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            border-radius: 12px;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 1;
            box-shadow:
                inset 0 0 60px 40px #FAF5FF,
                inset 0 0 100px 60px rgba(250, 245, 255, 0.8);
        }

        @media (max-width: 968px) {
            .connect-section-inner {
                flex-direction: column;
                text-align: left;
                gap: 40px;
            }

            .connect-text-content {
                max-width: 100%;
                order: 1;
            }

            .connect-video-wrapper {
                order: 2;
            }

            .connect-features {
                align-items: flex-start;
            }

            .connect-video-section video {
                width: auto;
                height: auto;
                max-width: 100%;
                max-height: 60vh;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .connect-video-section {
                padding: var(--section-padding-sm) 24px;
            }

            .connect-text-content h2 {
                font-size: var(--section-h2-mobile);
                letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-md);
            }

            .connect-text-content .subhead {
                font-size: var(--body-text);
            }

            .connect-feature-item {
                font-size: var(--body-text);
            }

            .connect-video-wrapper::before {
                box-shadow:
                    inset 0 0 40px 25px #FAF5FF,
                    inset 0 0 70px 40px rgba(250, 245, 255, 0.8);
            }
        }

        /* REFINE AND PACKAGE SECTION */
        .refine-package {
            padding: 80px 24px;
            max-width: 900px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            text-align: center;
            background: #FAF5FF;
        }

        .refine-package h2 {
            font-size: 40px;
            font-weight: 300;
            text-transform: none;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            line-height: 1.3;
            color: var(--text-color);
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }

        .refine-package h2 .word {
            display: inline-block;
            opacity: 0;
            filter: blur(10px);
            transform: translateY(10px);
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease, filter 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease;
        }

        .refine-package h2 .word.revealed {
            opacity: 1;
            filter: blur(0);
            transform: translateY(0);
        }

        .refine-package p {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: #000;
            line-height: 1.6;
            max-width: 700px;
            margin: 0 auto 32px;
        }

        .refine-package-video {
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 600px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            aspect-ratio: 16/9;
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: var(--bg-color);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .refine-package-video video {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            display: block;
            object-fit: cover;
        }

        .refine-package-placeholder {
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 300;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .refine-package {
                padding: 80px 24px 60px 24px;
            }

            .refine-package h2 {
                font-size: 36px;
                max-width: 100%;
                text-align: left;
            }

            .refine-package p {
                text-align: left;
                margin: 0 0 32px 0;
            }
        }

        /* CTA Section with Gradient - 4th section = 64px padding */
        .cta-gradient-section {
            padding: var(--section-padding-sm) 0;
            text-align: center;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #ffffff 0%, #ffffff 100%);
        }

        .cta-gradient-section::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: -200px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 720px;
            height: 450px;
            background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center top,
                rgba(255, 200, 150, 0.8) 0%,
                rgba(255, 180, 130, 0.65) 20%,
                rgba(240, 180, 200, 0.5) 40%,
                rgba(220, 180, 220, 0.35) 60%,
                transparent 85%
            );
            border-radius: 50% 50% 0 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            filter: blur(20px);
            -webkit-filter: blur(20px);
        }

        /* Section H2 styling */
        .cta-gradient-section h2 {
            font-size: var(--section-h2);
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-40);
            color: var(--text-color);
            margin-bottom: 40px;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
            line-height: var(--lh-headers);
        }

        .cta-gradient-section .cta-button-black {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .cta-gradient-section {
                padding: var(--section-padding-sm) 20px;
            }

            .cta-gradient-section::before {
                width: 100%;
                height: 400px;
                top: -150px;
            }

            .cta-gradient-section h2 {
                font-size: var(--section-h2-mobile);
                letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-md);
            }

            .cta-gradient-section h2 br {
                display: none;
            }
        }

        /* Section H2 */
        .features-title {
            font-size: var(--section-h2);
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
            margin-bottom: 60px;
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-40);
            line-height: var(--lh-headers);
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-align: center;
        }

        /* Marquee Styles - Static Grid with Flip Cards */
        .marquee-container {
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            position: relative;
            padding: 0;
            overflow-x: auto;
            overflow-y: hidden;
            -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
            scrollbar-width: none;
            -ms-overflow-style: none;
            scroll-snap-type: x mandatory;
        }

        .marquee-container::-webkit-scrollbar {
            display: none;
        }

        .marquee-inner {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: nowrap;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 12px;
            width: fit-content;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 8px 0;
        }

        @media (max-width: 1100px) {
            .marquee-container {
                padding: 0;
                scroll-padding: 0;
            }

            .marquee-inner {
                justify-content: flex-start;
                padding: 8px 16px 8px 0;
            }
        }

        .marquee-fade-left,
        .marquee-fade-right {
            display: none;
        }

        .marquee-card {
            width: 165px;
            height: 185px;
            position: relative;
            perspective: 1000px;
            cursor: pointer;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            scroll-snap-align: start;
        }

        .marquee-card-inner {
            position: relative;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            transition: transform 0.6s ease;
            transform-style: preserve-3d;
        }

        .marquee-card:hover .marquee-card-inner {
            transform: rotateY(180deg);
        }

        /* Front face - colored background with title */
        .marquee-card-front {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: flex-start;
            justify-content: flex-start;
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            backface-visibility: hidden;
            -webkit-backface-visibility: hidden;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }

        /* H3 styling for cards - 22px uses 0px letter-spacing */
        .marquee-card-front-title {
            color: var(--text-color);
            font-size: var(--h3);
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-body);
            line-height: 1.2;
        }

        /* Card front colors */
        .marquee-card:nth-child(6n+1) .marquee-card-front { background: #A77EEB; }
        .marquee-card:nth-child(6n+2) .marquee-card-front { background: #D1BCF3; }
        .marquee-card:nth-child(6n+3) .marquee-card-front { background: #F7AA96; }
        .marquee-card:nth-child(6n+4) .marquee-card-front { background: #F0D0FF; }
        .marquee-card:nth-child(6n+5) .marquee-card-front { background: #FFECE4; }
        .marquee-card:nth-child(6n+6) .marquee-card-front { background: #DD98FF; }

        /* Back face - same color as front with white text */
        .marquee-card-back {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: flex-start;
            justify-content: flex-start;
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            backface-visibility: hidden;
            -webkit-backface-visibility: hidden;
            transform: rotateY(180deg);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }

        /* Back face colors - same as front */
        .marquee-card:nth-child(6n+1) .marquee-card-back { background: #A77EEB; }
        .marquee-card:nth-child(6n+2) .marquee-card-back { background: #D1BCF3; }
        .marquee-card:nth-child(6n+3) .marquee-card-back { background: #F7AA96; }
        .marquee-card:nth-child(6n+4) .marquee-card-back { background: #F0D0FF; }
        .marquee-card:nth-child(6n+5) .marquee-card-back { background: #FFECE4; }
        .marquee-card:nth-child(6n+6) .marquee-card-back { background: #DD98FF; }

        .marquee-card-title {
            font-size: var(--section-subhead);
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-body);
            line-height: var(--lh-body);
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-align: left;
        }

        .marquee-card-desc {
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
            color: var(--text-color);
            line-height: 1.4;
            text-align: left;
        }

        /* Mobile responsive */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .marquee-card {
                width: 140px;
                height: 160px;
            }

            .marquee-card-front-title {
                font-size: 18px;
            }

            .marquee-card-title {
                font-size: 15px;
            }

            .marquee-card-desc {
                font-size: 13px;
            }
        }

        /* Marquee scroll arrows */
        .marquee-arrows {
            display: none;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            margin-top: 16px;
        }

        .marquee-arrows.visible {
            display: flex;
        }

        .marquee-arrow {
            width: 28px;
            height: 28px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: var(--purple-5);
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
            border: none;
            padding: 0;
            margin-top: 10px;
        }

        .marquee-arrow:hover {
            background: var(--purple-5);
        }

        .marquee-arrow:active {
            transform: scale(0.95);
        }

        .marquee-arrow svg {
            width: 11px;
            height: 11px;
            stroke: var(--text-color);
            stroke-width: 2;
            fill: none;
        }

        .marquee-arrow:hover svg {
            stroke: var(--accent-blue);
        }

        /* Running text style */
        .features-subtext {
            text-align: center;
            font-size: var(--body-text);
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            line-height: var(--lh-body);
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-body);
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
            margin-top: 32px;
        }

        /* Integrations */
        .integrations {
            padding: var(--section-padding-lg) 0;
            background: transparent;
            position: relative;
        }

        .integrations-title {
            font-size: 19px;
            font-weight: 500;
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }

        .integrations-title span {
            color: var(--text-color);
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .integrations-grid {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 16px;
            max-width: 800px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        .integration-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            padding: 12px 20px;
            background: var(--bg-color);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 8px;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
        }

        .integration-item:hover {
            background: var(--purple-5);
            border-color: var(--purple-10);
        }

        .integration-logo {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .integration-logo svg {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
        }

        .integration-name {
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 14px;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        /* How it works - Feature Steps - 2nd section = 64px padding */
        .feature-steps {
            padding: var(--section-padding-sm) 24px;
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: #FAF5FF;
        }

        .feature-steps__container {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 32px;
        }

        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .feature-steps {
                padding: var(--section-padding-sm) 48px;
            }

            .feature-steps__container {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.1fr;
                gap: 48px;
                align-items: start;
            }
        }

        /* Intro section (left side) */
        .feature-steps__intro {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: flex-start;
            order: 1;
        }

        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .feature-steps__intro {
                position: sticky;
                top: 88px; /* Nav height (64px) + some padding */
                align-self: start;
            }
        }

        /* Section H2 styling */
        .feature-steps__intro-text {
            font-size: var(--section-h2);
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-40);
            color: var(--text-color);
            line-height: var(--lh-headers);
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        .feature-steps__divider {
            margin-top: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            border: none;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color, #e5e5e5);
        }

        /* Steps List */
        .steps-list {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 86px;
            order: 2;
        }

        .step-item {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 18px;
            opacity: 1;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 16px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            background: transparent;
        }

        .step-item:hover {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .step-item.active {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .step-icon {
            width: 38px;
            height: 38px;
            border-radius: 9px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            background-color: #000000;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
        }

        .step-icon svg {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
        }

        .step-item.active .step-icon {
            background-color: #000000;
        }

        .step-item.completed .step-icon {
            background-color: #000000;
        }

        .step-item .step-content {
            flex: 1;
            padding-top: 4px;
            max-width: 80%;
        }

        /* H3 (Cards/Panels) - 22px, weight 300, ls 0px, lh 1.2 */
        .step-item .step-content h3 {
            font-size: var(--h3);
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-body);
            line-height: 1.2;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
            color: var(--text-color);
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
        }

        .step-item.active .step-content h3 {
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        /* Running Text - 16px, weight 300, ls -1.5px, lh 1.5 */
        .step-item .step-content p {
            font-size: var(--body-text);
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            line-height: var(--lh-body);
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-body);
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .step-item .step-content p {
                font-size: 16px;
            }
        }

        .step-item.active .step-content p {
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }

        /* Step dots - hidden on all screen sizes */
        .step-dots {
            display: none;
        }

        .step-dot {
            width: 8px;
            height: 8px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: var(--grey-20, #D3D1D5);
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .step-dot:hover {
            background: var(--purple-10);
        }

        .step-dot.active {
            background: var(--accent-blue, #9A70DF);
            transform: scale(1.25);
        }

        .video-placeholder {
            aspect-ratio: 16/9;
            max-width: 100%;
            width: 100%;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
            border: none;
            border-radius: 12px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 12px;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .video-thumbnail {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            border-radius: 12px;
            z-index: 1;
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
        }

        .video-thumbnail.hidden {
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .video-play-button {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 80px;
            height: 80px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95);
            border: none;
            border-radius: 50%;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            z-index: 2;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }

        .video-play-button:hover {
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.1);
            box-shadow: 0 6px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
        }

        .video-play-button.hidden {
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        /* Video is clickable when playing */
        .video-placeholder.playing video {
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .video-placeholder video {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            border-radius: 12px;
        }

        .video-sound-button {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 16px;
            right: 16px;
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
            border: none;
            border-radius: 50%;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            z-index: 3;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .video-sound-button.visible {
            opacity: 1;
            pointer-events: auto;
        }

        .video-sound-button:hover {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
        }

        .video-sound-button svg {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            color: white;
        }

        .video-sound-button svg.hidden {
            display: none;
        }

        .video-play-button .play-icon,
        .video-play-button .pause-icon {
            width: 32px;
            height: 32px;
            fill: #18181b;
        }

        .video-play-button .play-icon {
            margin-left: 4px;
        }

        .video-play-button svg.hidden {
            display: none;
        }

        /* Expand button - mobile only */
        .video-expand-button {
            display: none;
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 16px;
            left: 16px;
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
            border: none;
            border-radius: 50%;
            cursor: pointer;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            z-index: 3;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .video-expand-button:hover {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
        }

        .video-expand-button svg {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            color: white;
        }

        /* Video expanded state */
        .video-placeholder.expanded {
            position: fixed !important;
            top: 0 !important;
            left: 0 !important;
            right: 0 !important;
            bottom: 0 !important;
            width: 100vw !important;
            height: 100vh !important;
            max-width: none !important;
            z-index: 9999 !important;
            border-radius: 0 !important;
            background: #000 !important;
            transform: none !important;
        }

        .video-placeholder.expanded video {
            object-fit: contain;
            border-radius: 0;
        }

        .video-placeholder.expanded .video-expand-button svg {
            transform: rotate(180deg);
        }

        /* Expanded mode button positioning - move buttons higher to avoid mobile menu */
        .video-placeholder.expanded .video-sound-button {
            bottom: 80px;
        }

        .video-placeholder.expanded .video-expand-button {
            bottom: 80px;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .video-play-button {
                width: 56px;
                height: 56px;
            }

            .video-play-button .play-icon,
            .video-play-button .pause-icon {
                width: 24px;
                height: 24px;
            }

            .video-play-button .play-icon {
                margin-left: 3px;
            }

            .video-expand-button {
                display: flex;
            }

            .video-expand-button.visible {
                display: flex;
            }
        }

        .video-placeholder-icon {
            width: 64px;
            height: 64px;
            background: var(--purple-5);
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .video-placeholder-icon svg {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            fill: var(--accent-blue);
        }

        .video-placeholder-text {
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 500;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
        }

        /* Closing CTA */
        .closing {
            padding: var(--section-padding-sm) 0;
            text-align: center;
            background: transparent;
            position: relative;
        }

        .closing-text {
            font-size: var(--section-h2);
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
            line-height: var(--lh-headers);
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-40);
            margin-bottom: 32px;
            max-width: 600px;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
        }

        .closing-text .dim {
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            letter-spacing: -1px;
            font-weight: 300;
        }

        .closing-text .bright {
            color: var(--accent-blue);
            font-weight: 300;
            letter-spacing: -1px;
        }

        /* Closing CTA section styles handled above */

        /* ========== FOOTER ========== */
        .footer-wrapper {
            background: white;
            width: 100%;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .footer-container {
            max-width: 1440px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 40px 24px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        .footer-content {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
            margin-top: 40px;
        }

        .footer-column {
            margin-left: 125px;
        }

        .footer-column h3 {
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 400;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            color: #000000;
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            font-style: normal;
            line-height: 24px;
        }

        .footer-column ul {
            list-style: none;
            padding: 0;
        }

        .footer-column ul li a {
            color: #000000;
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 24px;
            text-decoration: none;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .footer-column ul li a:hover {
            color: #000000;
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        .footer-bottom {
            text-align: center;
        }

        .footer-bottom p {
            color: #000000;
            text-align: center;
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 24px;
        }

        /* ========== RESPONSIVE ========== */
        @media (max-width: 905px) {
            nav {
                padding: 15px 1.5rem;
            }

            .nav-links-center,
            .nav-links-right {
                display: none;
            }

            .hamburger {
                display: block;
            }

            nav {
                padding: 15px 1.5rem;
            }
        }

        @media (min-width: 906px) {
            .mobile-menu {
                display: none;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .container {
                padding: 0 20px;
            }

            .hero {
                height: 100vh;
                padding: 0;
            }

            /* Mobile: All sections use 64px padding */
            .problem,
            .solution,
            .features,
            .connect-video-section,
            .refine-package,
            .cta-gradient-section,
            .integrations,
            .feature-steps,
            .closing {
                padding-top: var(--section-padding-sm) !important;
                padding-bottom: var(--section-padding-sm) !important;
            }

            .problem-card {
                padding: 24px;
                display: flex;
                justify-content: center;
                align-items: center;
            }

            .video-placeholder {
                max-width: 100%;
                width: 100vw;
                margin: 0 auto;
                border-radius: 20px;
                transform: scale(1.05);
            }

            .video-placeholder video {
                border-radius: 20px;
            }

            .feature-steps__divider {
                margin-top: 10px;
                margin-bottom: 10px;
                order: 2;
            }

            .cards-container {
                order: 1;
            }

            /* Mobile sticky intro section */
            .feature-steps__intro {
                position: sticky;
                top: 64px; /* Exact nav height */
                z-index: 100;
                background: #FAF5FF;
                padding: 20px 0 16px 0; /* Top padding creates visual buffer */
                margin-bottom: 16px;
                box-shadow: 0 20px 0 0 #FAF5FF; /* Extends background below */
                transition: top 0.3s ease-in-out; /* Smooth transition when nav hides */
            }

            /* When nav is hidden, push intro to top */
            nav.nav-hidden ~ * .feature-steps__intro,
            body:has(nav.nav-hidden) .feature-steps__intro {
                top: 0;
            }

            .feature-steps__list {
                position: relative;
                z-index: 1;
            }

            .features {
                padding-left: 20px;
                padding-right: 20px;
            }

            .features-title {
                font-size: var(--section-h2-mobile);
                letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-md);
            }

            .feature-steps__intro-text {
                font-size: var(--section-h2-mobile);
                letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-md);
            }

            .integrations-grid {
                gap: 12px;
            }

            .integration-item {
                padding: 10px 16px;
            }

            .step {
                grid-template-columns: 40px 1fr;
                gap: 16px;
            }

            .step-number {
                width: 40px;
                height: 40px;
                font-size: 14px;
            }

            .step:not(:last-child)::after {
                left: 19px;
                top: 60px;
            }

            .steps-list {
                gap: 20px !important;
            }

            .step-item {
                padding: 8px !important;
            }

            .step-icon {
                width: 34px !important;
                height: 34px !important;
                border-radius: 8px !important;
            }

            .step-icon svg {
                width: 18px !important;
                height: 18px !important;
            }

            /* Mobile Footer Styles */
            .footer-container {
                padding: 20px 20px 40px;
            }

            .footer-content {
                display: grid;
                grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
                gap: 20px;
                margin-bottom: 24px;
                margin-top: 24px;
            }

            .footer-column {
                margin-left: 0;
                margin-bottom: 24px;
            }

            .footer-column:last-child {
                margin-bottom: 0;
            }

            .footer-column h3 {
                font-size: 14px;
                margin-bottom: 16px;
                line-height: 20px;
            }

            .footer-column ul li a {
                font-size: 12px;
                line-height: 20px;
            }

            .footer-column ul li {
                margin-bottom: 12px;
            }

            .footer-bottom p {
                font-size: 11px;
                line-height: 20px;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="app-root">
        <!-- Shared SVG icon definitions -->
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="position:absolute;width:0;height:0;overflow:hidden">
            <defs>
                <linearGradient id="logo-hover-gradient" x1="0" y1="1" x2="0" y2="0" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">

    <script>
    (function() {
        // Connect video with 5 second pause between loops
        const connectVideo = document.getElementById('connectVideo');
