        // Refine Package Title Animation
        function wrapWordsForAnimation(selector) {
            const element = document.querySelector(selector);
            if (!element) return;

            const text = element.textContent;
            const words = text.split(' ');
            element.innerHTML = words.map(word => `<span class="word">${word}</span>`).join(' ');
        }

        function observeAndReveal(selector, threshold = 60) {
            const element = document.querySelector(selector);
            if (!element) return;

            const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
                entries.forEach(entry => {
                    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                        const words = element.querySelectorAll('.word');
                        words.forEach((word, index) => {
                            setTimeout(() => {
                                word.classList.add('revealed');
                            }, index * 100);
                        });
                        observer.unobserve(element);
                    }
                });
            }, { threshold: threshold / 100 });

            observer.observe(element);
        }

        // Initialize refine package animations
        wrapWordsForAnimation('.refine-package h2');
        observeAndReveal('.refine-package h2', 60);

        let currentState = {
            colors: ['#faf5ff', '#f3e8ff', '#ffffff'],
            speed: 3.0,
            backgroundColor: '#faf5ff',
            hero: {
                title: 'The micro-control layer ',
                highlight: 'for your low-code app',
                subtitle: 'Make precise changes, run A/B tests and personalize experiences without breaking the rest of your app.',
                primaryButton: {
                    text: 'Gain control',
                    url: 'https://dashboard.myop.dev/'
                },
                secondaryButton: {
                    text: 'Talk to an expert',
                    url: 'https://calendly.com/myopdev/demo?month=2026-03'
                }
            }
        };

        function hexToRgba(hex, alpha) {
            const r = parseInt(hex.slice(1, 3), 16);
            const g = parseInt(hex.slice(3, 5), 16);
            const b = parseInt(hex.slice(5, 7), 16);
            return `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${alpha})`;
        }

        function applyMeshStyles(data) {
            const root = document.documentElement;
            const [c1, c2, c3] = data.colors;
            const speed = data.speed;

            root.style.setProperty('--mesh-bg', data.backgroundColor);

            root.style.setProperty('--color1', hexToRgba(c1, 1));
            root.style.setProperty('--color1-trans', hexToRgba(c1, 0.6));

            root.style.setProperty('--color2', hexToRgba(c2, 0.95));
            root.style.setProperty('--color2-trans', hexToRgba(c2, 0.6));

            root.style.setProperty('--color3', hexToRgba(c3, 0.95));
            root.style.setProperty('--color3-strong', hexToRgba(c3, 0.85));
            root.style.setProperty('--color3-mid', hexToRgba(c3, 0.6));
            root.style.setProperty('--color3-weak', hexToRgba(c3, 0.3));

            root.style.setProperty('--duration1', `${6 / speed}s`);
            root.style.setProperty('--duration2', `${8 / speed}s`);
            root.style.setProperty('--duration3', `${7 / speed}s`);
            root.style.setProperty('--duration4', `${5 / speed}s`);
            root.style.setProperty('--duration5', `${9 / speed}s`);
            root.style.setProperty('--duration6', `${7 / speed}s`);
            root.style.setProperty('--duration7', `${10 / speed}s`);
        }

        function renderHero(heroData) {
            const titleEl = document.getElementById('heroTitle');
            const subtitleEl = document.getElementById('heroSubtitle');
            const buttonsEl = document.getElementById('heroButtons');

            if (titleEl && heroData.title !== undefined) {

                if (heroData.highlight) {
                    titleHTML = heroData.title + '<span class="highlight">' + heroData.highlight + '</span>';
                }
                titleEl.innerHTML = titleHTML;
            }

            if (subtitleEl && heroData.subtitle !== undefined) {
                subtitleEl.textContent = heroData.subtitle;
            }

            if (buttonsEl && (heroData.primaryButton || heroData.secondaryButton)) {
                let buttonsHTML = '';
                if (heroData.primaryButton) {
                    buttonsHTML += `<button class="cta-button-black" data-hero-action="primary" data-url="${heroData.primaryButton.url}">${heroData.primaryButton.text}</button>`;
                }
                if (heroData.secondaryButton) {
                    buttonsHTML += `<button class="cta-button-outline" data-hero-action="secondary" data-url="${heroData.secondaryButton.url}">${heroData.secondaryButton.text}</button>`;
                }
                buttonsEl.innerHTML = buttonsHTML;
            }
        }

        function render(data) {
            currentState = { ...currentState, ...data };
            if (data.colors || data.speed || data.backgroundColor) {
                applyMeshStyles(currentState);
            }
            if (data.hero) {
                currentState.hero = { ...currentState.hero, ...data.hero };

            } else if (action === 'secondary') {

        window.handleCta = handleCta;

        function toggleFeature(element) {
            const isExpanded = element.classList.contains('expanded');
            const toggle = element.querySelector('.connect-feature-toggle');

            // Close all other items first
            const allItems = document.querySelectorAll('.connect-feature-item');
            allItems.forEach(item => {
                if (item !== element) {
                    item.classList.remove('expanded');
                    item.querySelector('.connect-feature-toggle').textContent = '+';
                }
            });

            if (isExpanded) {
                element.classList.remove('expanded');
                toggle.textContent = '+';
            } else {
                element.classList.add('expanded');

        // Initialize mesh on load
        applyMeshStyles(currentState);

        // Animated text on scroll
        function initAnimatedText() {
            const textElement = document.getElementById('animatedText');
            if (!textElement) return;

            // Get the HTML content and split by <br>
            const html = textElement.innerHTML;
            const lines = html.split(/<br\s*\/?>/i);
            textElement.innerHTML = '';

            lines.forEach((line, lineIndex) => {
                const text = line.trim();
                const words = text.split(' ');
                
                words.forEach((word, wordIndex) => {
                    const wordSpan = document.createElement('span');
                    wordSpan.style.display = 'inline';
                    
                    // Wrap each character in the word
                    for (let i = 0; i < word.length; i++) {
                        const charSpan = document.createElement('span');
                        charSpan.className = 'char';
                        charSpan.textContent = word[i];
                        wordSpan.appendChild(charSpan);
                    }
                    
                    textElement.appendChild(wordSpan);
                    
                    // Add space after word (except last word in line)
                    if (wordIndex < words.length - 1) {
                        textElement.appendChild(document.createTextNode(' '));
                    }
                });
                
                // Add line break after each line (except last)
                if (lineIndex < lines.length - 1) {
                    textElement.appendChild(document.createElement('br'));
                }
            });
        }

        function updateAnimatedText() {
            const textElement = document.getElementById('animatedText');
            if (!textElement) return;

            const chars = textElement.querySelectorAll('.char');
            if (chars.length === 0) return;

            const rect = textElement.getBoundingClientRect();
            const appRoot = document.getElementById('app-root');
            const viewportHeight = appRoot.clientHeight;
            const isMobile = window.innerWidth <= 768;

            // Calculate scroll progress through the text element
            // On desktop: start when second row is visible (element more in view)
            // On mobile: start when element enters viewport
            const elementTop = rect.top;
            const startPoint = isMobile ? viewportHeight * 0.85 : viewportHeight * 0.65; // Desktop starts later (when 2nd row visible)
            const endPoint = viewportHeight * 0.25;   // Complete when element is 25% down viewport

            // Calculate progress (0 to 1)
            let progress = 0;
            if (elementTop <= startPoint && elementTop >= endPoint) {
                progress = (startPoint - elementTop) / (startPoint - endPoint);
            } else if (elementTop < endPoint) {
                progress = 1;
            }

            // Determine how many characters to reveal based on scroll progress
            const charsToReveal = Math.floor(progress * chars.length);

            chars.forEach((char, index) => {
                if (index < charsToReveal) {
                    char.classList.add('active');
                } else {
                    char.classList.remove('active');
                }
            });
        }

        initAnimatedText();

        // Current card positions (for smooth animation)
        const cardPositions = [];
        for (let i = 0; i < TOTAL_CARDS; i++) {
            cardPositions.push({ x: 0, y: 0, rotation: 0, scale: 1, opacity: 1 });
        }

        // Utility functions
        const lerp = (start, end, t) => start * (1 - t) + end * t;

        // Create cards
        function createLogoCards() {
            const cardsContainer = document.getElementById('cardsContainer');
            if (!cardsContainer) return;

            for (let i = 0; i < TOTAL_CARDS; i++) {
                const logo = LOGOS[i];
                const card = document.createElement('div');
                card.className = 'logo-card';
                card.id = `card-${i}`;

                // Logos scaling: Shopify (5) = 90%, Bolt (0), Webflow (3) = 80%, Lovable (2), WordPress (4) = 70%
                const scaled90 = [5];
                const scaled80 = [0, 3];
                const scaled75 = [];
                const scaled70 = [2, 4];
                let scaleClass = '';
                if (scaled90.includes(i)) scaleClass = ' logo-scaled-90';
                else if (scaled80.includes(i)) scaleClass = ' logo-scaled-80';
                if (scaled75.includes(i)) scaleClass = ' logo-scaled-75';
                if (scaled70.includes(i)) scaleClass = ' logo-scaled-70';

                let frontContent = '';
                if (logo.type === 'svg') {
                    frontContent = logo.content;
                } else {
                    frontContent = `<img src="${logo.content}" alt="Logo">`;
                }

                card.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="logo-card-inner">
                        <div class="logo-card-front${scaleClass}">
                            ${frontContent}
                        </div>
                        <div class="logo-card-back">
                            <span class="label">${LOGO_NAMES[i]}</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
                cardsContainer.appendChild(card);
            }
        }

        // Calculate target position based on current state
        function calculateLogoTarget(index) {
            let target = { x: 0, y: 0, rotation: 0, scale: 1, opacity: 1 };
            const isSmallMobile = logoContainerWidth < 400;
            const isMediumMobile = logoContainerWidth < 600;
            const isTablet = logoContainerWidth < 905;

            // Dynamic spacing - reduced by 20% total, aligned to left
            const cardWidth = 50;
            const availableWidth = logoContainerWidth - cardWidth;
            let lineSpacing = (availableWidth / (TOTAL_CARDS - 1)) * 0.81; // 20% smaller gap total
            let scale = 1;

            if (isSmallMobile) {
                scale = 0.9;
            } else if (isMediumMobile) {
                scale = 0.9;
            } else if (isTablet) {
                scale = 0.9;
            }

            const lineTotalWidth = (TOTAL_CARDS - 1) * lineSpacing;
            // Align to left: start from left edge of container instead of center
            const lineX = index * lineSpacing - (logoContainerWidth / 2) + (cardWidth / 2);
            target = { x: lineX, y: 0, rotation: 0, scale: scale, opacity: 1 };

            return target;
        }

        // Update card transforms with spring-like smoothing
        function updateLogoCards() {
            const cardsContainer = document.getElementById('cardsContainer');
            if (!cardsContainer) return;

            const cards = cardsContainer.querySelectorAll('.logo-card');

            cards.forEach((card, i) => {
                const target = calculateLogoTarget(i);

                // Spring-like interpolation
                const springFactor = 0.08;
                cardPositions[i].x = lerp(cardPositions[i].x, target.x, springFactor);
                cardPositions[i].y = lerp(cardPositions[i].y, target.y, springFactor);
                cardPositions[i].rotation = lerp(cardPositions[i].rotation, target.rotation, springFactor);
                cardPositions[i].scale = lerp(cardPositions[i].scale, target.scale, springFactor);
                cardPositions[i].opacity = lerp(cardPositions[i].opacity, target.opacity, springFactor);

                const pos = cardPositions[i];
                // Cards are positioned at left:50% top:50%, so translate -50% to center, then add offset
                card.style.transform = `
                    translate(calc(-50% + ${pos.x}px), calc(-50% + ${pos.y}px))
                    rotate(${pos.rotation}deg)
                    scale(${pos.scale})
                `;
                card.style.opacity = pos.opacity;
            });
        }

        // Animation loop for logos
        function animateLogos() {
            updateLogoCards();
            requestAnimationFrame(animateLogos);
        }

        function initMarqueeCards() {
            const container = document.getElementById('marqueeCards');
            const marqueeContainer = document.getElementById('marqueeContainer');
            const dotsContainer = document.getElementById('marqueeDots');
            if (!container) return;

            // Create cards once - static grid with flip on hover
            marqueeCards.forEach((card) => {
                const el = document.createElement('div');
                el.className = 'marquee-card';
                el.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="marquee-card-inner">
                        <!-- Front face: colored background with title -->
                        <div class="marquee-card-front">
                            <h3 class="marquee-card-front-title">${card.title}</h3>
                        </div>
                        <!-- Back face: description -->
                        <div class="marquee-card-back">
                            <h3 class="marquee-card-title">${card.title}</h3>
                            <p class="marquee-card-desc">${card.desc}</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
                container.appendChild(el);
            });

            // Create scroll arrows for navigation when overflow
            const arrowsContainer = document.getElementById('marqueeArrows');
            if (arrowsContainer && marqueeContainer) {
                const gap = 12;

                // Left arrow
                const leftArrow = document.createElement('button');
                leftArrow.className = 'marquee-arrow';
                leftArrow.innerHTML = `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polyline points="15 18 9 12 15 6"></polyline></svg>`;
                leftArrow.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    const cardWidth = window.innerWidth <= 768 ? 140 : 165;
                    const scrollAmount = cardWidth + gap;
                    const maxScroll = marqueeContainer.scrollWidth - marqueeContainer.clientWidth;

                    // Carousel: if at start, go to end
                    if (marqueeContainer.scrollLeft <= 0) {
                        marqueeContainer.scrollTo({ left: maxScroll, behavior: 'smooth' });
                    } else {
                        marqueeContainer.scrollBy({ left: -scrollAmount, behavior: 'smooth' });
                    }
                });

                // Right arrow
                const rightArrow = document.createElement('button');
                rightArrow.className = 'marquee-arrow';
                rightArrow.innerHTML = `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"></polyline></svg>`;
                rightArrow.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    const cardWidth = window.innerWidth <= 768 ? 140 : 165;
                    const scrollAmount = cardWidth + gap;
                    const maxScroll = marqueeContainer.scrollWidth - marqueeContainer.clientWidth;

                    // Carousel: if at end, go to start
                    if (marqueeContainer.scrollLeft >= maxScroll - 1) {
                        marqueeContainer.scrollTo({ left: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
                    } else {
                        marqueeContainer.scrollBy({ left: scrollAmount, behavior: 'smooth' });
                    }
                });

                arrowsContainer.appendChild(leftArrow);
                arrowsContainer.appendChild(rightArrow);

                // Show arrows only if there's overflow
                function checkOverflow() {
                    const hasOverflow = marqueeContainer.scrollWidth > marqueeContainer.clientWidth;
                    if (hasOverflow) {
                        arrowsContainer.classList.add('visible');
                    } else {
                        arrowsContainer.classList.remove('visible');
                    }
                }

                window.addEventListener('resize', checkOverflow);
                checkOverflow();
            }
        }

        // Initialize marquee cards when DOM is ready
        if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initMarqueeCards);

        // Sticky Navigation with Show/Hide on Scroll
        const nav = document.getElementById('mainNav');
        let lastScrollTop = 0;

        document.getElementById('app-root').addEventListener('scroll', function() {
            const scrollTop = this.scrollTop;

            // Update animated text
            updateAnimatedText();

            // Standard nav show/hide behavior
            if (Math.abs(scrollTop - lastScrollTop) < scrollThreshold) return;

            if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
                if (!isNavHidden) {
                    nav.classList.add('nav-hidden');
                    isNavHidden = true;
                }
            } else if (scrollTop < lastScrollTop) {
                if (isNavHidden) {
                    nav.classList.remove('nav-hidden');
                    isNavHidden = false;
                }
            }

            if (scrollTop <= 0) {
                nav.classList.remove('nav-hidden');
                isNavHidden = false;
            }

            lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
        }, { passive: true });

            const thumbnail = document.getElementById('videoThumbnail');

            const playIcon = playButton ? playButton.querySelector('.play-icon') : null;
            const pauseIcon = playButton ? playButton.querySelector('.pause-icon') : null;
            const expandButton = document.getElementById('videoExpandButton');
            const soundButton = document.getElementById('problemVideoSoundButton');
            const soundOff = soundButton ? soundButton.querySelector('.sound-off') : null;
            const soundOn = soundButton ? soundButton.querySelector('.sound-on') : null;
            let isFirstPlay = true;

            if (!video || !playButton) return;

            function showPlayState() {
                if (playIcon) playIcon.classList.remove('hidden');
                if (pauseIcon) pauseIcon.classList.add('hidden');
                container.classList.remove('playing');

            function showPauseState() {
                if (playIcon) playIcon.classList.add('hidden');
                if (pauseIcon) pauseIcon.classList.remove('hidden');

            // Initial play button - only for first play
            playButton.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                e.stopPropagation();
                if (isFirstPlay) {
                    if (thumbnail) thumbnail.classList.add('hidden');
                    if (soundButton) soundButton.classList.add('visible');
                    playButton.classList.add('hidden');
                    video.play();
                    showPauseState();
                    isFirstPlay = false;
                }
            });

            // Click/tap on video to pause/play
            video.addEventListener('click', function() {
                if (isFirstPlay) return;
                if (video.paused) {
                    video.play();
                    showPauseState();
                } else {
                    video.pause();
                    showPlayState();
                }
            });

            // Expand button handler (mobile)
            // Store original parent and placeholder for moving the container
            let originalParent = container.parentElement;
            let placeholder = document.createElement('div');
            placeholder.id = 'videoContainerPlaceholder';
            placeholder.style.display = 'none';

            if (expandButton) {
                expandButton.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    e.stopPropagation();

                    if (!container.classList.contains('expanded')) {
                        // Expanding: move container to body to escape overflow:hidden parents
                        originalParent = container.parentElement;
                        originalParent.insertBefore(placeholder, container);
                        document.body.appendChild(container);
                        container.classList.add('expanded');
                        document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
                    } else {
                        // Collapsing: move container back to original position
                        container.classList.remove('expanded');
                        document.body.style.overflow = '';
                        if (placeholder.parentElement) {
                            placeholder.parentElement.insertBefore(container, placeholder);
                            placeholder.remove();
                        }
                    }
                });
            }

            // Sound toggle handler
            if (soundButton) {
                soundButton.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    video.muted = !video.muted;
                    if (video.muted) {
                        soundOff.classList.remove('hidden');
                        soundOn.classList.add('hidden');
                    } else {
                        soundOff.classList.add('hidden');
                        soundOn.classList.remove('hidden');
                    }
                });
            }

            // When video ends, reset to initial state
            video.addEventListener('ended', function() {
                if (thumbnail) thumbnail.classList.remove('hidden');
                showPlayState();
                if (soundButton) soundButton.classList.remove('visible');
                isFirstPlay = true;
                // Collapse if expanded and move back to original position
                if (container.classList.contains('expanded')) {
                    container.classList.remove('expanded');
                    document.body.style.overflow = '';
                    if (placeholder.parentElement) {
                        placeholder.parentElement.insertBefore(container, placeholder);
                        placeholder.remove();
                    }
                }
            });
        })();
    })();

        class FeatureSteps {
            constructor(features) {
                this.features = features;
                this.currentFeature = 0;
                this.section = null;

                this.init();
            }

            init() {
                this.renderSteps();
                this.renderDots();
                this.section = document.querySelector('.feature-steps');
                this.setupScrollHandler();
                this.addClickHandlers();
            }

            renderSteps() {
                const stepsList = document.getElementById('stepsList');
                if (!stepsList) return;
                stepsList.innerHTML = this.features.map((feature, index) => `
                    <div class="step-item ${index === 0 ? 'active' : ''}" data-index="${index}">
                        <div class="step-icon">
                            ${feature.icon}
                        </div>
                        <div class="step-content">
                            <h3>${feature.title}</h3>
                            <p>${feature.content}</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `).join('');
            }

            renderDots() {
                const dotsContainer = document.getElementById('stepDots');
                if (!dotsContainer) return;
                dotsContainer.innerHTML = this.features.map((_, index) => `
                    <div class="step-dot ${index === 0 ? 'active' : ''}" data-index="${index}"></div>
                `).join('');
            }

            updateUI() {
                document.querySelectorAll('.step-item').forEach((item, index) => {
                    item.classList.remove('active', 'completed');
                    if (index === this.currentFeature) {
                        item.classList.add('active');
                    } else if (index < this.currentFeature) {
                        item.classList.add('completed');
                    }
                });

                document.querySelectorAll('.step-dot').forEach((dot, index) => {
                    dot.classList.toggle('active', index === this.currentFeature);
                });
            }

            setupScrollHandler() {
                const scrollContainer = document.getElementById('app-root');
                if (!scrollContainer || !this.section) return;

                scrollContainer.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
                    const sectionRect = this.section.getBoundingClientRect();
                    const sectionTop = sectionRect.top;
                    const sectionHeight = sectionRect.height;
                    const windowHeight = window.innerHeight;

                    // Calculate how far through the section we've scrolled
                    const scrollStart = windowHeight * 0.7;
                    const scrollEnd = -sectionHeight * 0.3;
                    const scrollRange = scrollStart - scrollEnd;
                    const scrollProgress = (scrollStart - sectionTop) / scrollRange;

                    // Map scroll progress to step index (0 to features.length - 1)
                    const stepIndex = Math.floor(scrollProgress * this.features.length);
                    const clampedIndex = Math.max(0, Math.min(this.features.length - 1, stepIndex));

                    if (clampedIndex !== this.currentFeature) {
                        this.currentFeature = clampedIndex;
                        this.updateUI();
                    }
                }, { passive: true });
            }

            goToFeature(index) {
                this.currentFeature = index;
                this.updateUI();
            }

            addClickHandlers() {
                document.querySelectorAll('.step-item').forEach((item) => {
                    item.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        const index = parseInt(item.dataset.index);
                        this.goToFeature(index);
                    });
                });

                document.querySelectorAll('.step-dot').forEach((dot) => {
                    dot.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        const index = parseInt(dot.dataset.index);
                        this.goToFeature(index);
                    });
                });
            }
        }

        new FeatureSteps(features);
    })();
